purpose: Turn terse operator research notes into lawful, source-backed seed packets that can feed Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, and Telos without pretending the note itself is evidence.

contract.claim_promotion_rule: A seed may be marked MATCH only when each promoted claim is backed by current lawful source receipts. Otherwise use UNVERIFIABLE and route to Gather.

gather: resolve the terse note into current lawful sources
record URLs, identifiers, snippets, and hashes without importing illicit full text
index: attach the seed to concepts, domains, source ids, and future context packs
forum: route the seed to a research, verification, science, or operator-decision lane
crucible: split claims from inspiration and assign MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE
telos: join the seed packet to later action receipts, loop ledger entries, and operator-visible research state

negative_test_cases.name: note_without_resolution
negative_test_cases.reason: The operator note is a lead, not evidence.

negative_test_cases.name: shadow_only_full_text
negative_test_cases.reason: Shadow-library material may guide lawful lookup, but cannot promote a claim.

negative_test_cases.name: stale_current_claim

input.operator_note: current model, API, person, or scientific claim

negative_test_cases.reason: Living claims require current source resolution.
